migration.title: Canza Yanar Gizon ku
migration.currentWebHostInfo: Bayanan Rundunar Yanar Gizo na Yanzu
migration.registeredUsername: Sunan Mai Amfani / Imel / ID da aka Yi Rajista
migration.ftpUsername: Sunan Mai Amfani na FTP / Panel na Sarrafa
migration.ftpPassword: Kalmar Sirri ta FTP / Panel na Sarrafa
migration.holdingPageQuestion: Idan gidan yanar gizo yana da rai/cunkoso tare da zirga-zirga mai yawa, za mu iya saita shafin jira yayin ƙaura?
migration.specialRequirementsQuestion: Shin wannan gidan yanar gizo yana da buƙatun musamman kamar Sigar PHP / Mododules?
migration.transferDomainQuestion: Kuna so mu taimaka muku canza rajistar sunan domain?
migration.updateNameserversQuestion: Kuna so mu sabunta sabar sunayen da zarar mun gama ƙaurar bayanai?
migration.domainRegistryPortal: Tashar Abokin Ciniki ta Rajistan Domain
migration.note1: Cika wannan fom zai buɗe sabon tiket ga sashen tallafi mu don fara ƙaurarku.
migration.note2: Da fatan za a kasance mai cikakke da daidaici gwargwado don gujewa kowane jinkiri.
migration.note3: Ana kammala ƙaura ta yau da kullum a cikin awanni 48 zuwa 72. Wani lokaci fiye da haka idan yawan bayanai da za a kwafi ya yi yawa.
migration.note4: Asusun hosting na tsoho yana buƙatar kasancewa a kan layi kuma ana iya shiga shi yayin da muke yin ƙaura, in ba haka ba za mu iya fuskantar wahala.
migration.note5: Da fatan za a ƙaurace wa yin sabunta kowace kan gidan yanar gizon ku yayin da muke yin ƙaura, in ba haka ba waɗancan bayanai na iya ba a kwafa su zuwa sabon hosting.
